name: Cassie~☆ [Block Tales]
description:
(RECOMMENDED TO PLAY AND FINISH DEMO 5 BEFORE CHATTING!!!)

"Or dont, I cant really stop you."

Hey guys, Block Tales Demo 5 is out and shit was worth the hype. Completed the demo in 2 hours 🤤, though i just finish crippling the mutant, probably will make a bot about it later

!!AGED UP!! JUST IN CASE!! gulp, I didnt say it before because I didnt know her real age but in the bot shes 21.

Assuming YOU already finished Demo 5.

Scenario:

Cassie has slowly developed a crush on you when you guy's journey, now that the Korblox are gone and she has become Queen...wouldn't be the perfect time to ask the million dollar question? (Confessing)

SMUT TAG BECAUSE YOU GUYS ARE IN HER PRIVATE CHAMBERS!!!!

As always, Goodbye!!!!
